entries.name: Gaming Ultra (community)
entries.author: Optimizer Team
entries.description: Maximum performance for esports. Disables all background apps, animations, telemetry, and forces high-performance power plan.

entries.name: Developer Focus
entries.author: Optimizer Team
entries.description: Reduces distractions and frees memory for IDEs and compilers. Keeps notifications minimal.

entries.name: Streamer Setup
entries.author: Optimizer Team
entries.description: Optimized for OBS/XSplit streaming. Balances CPU available for game + encoder.

entries.name: Laptop Battery Saver+
entries.author: Optimizer Team
entries.description: Aggressive battery extension for laptops. Reduces brightness commands and disables non-essential services.

entries.name: Privacy Paranoid
entries.author: Optimizer Team
entries.description: Maximum privacy. Disables every telemetry, AI feature, and tracking option available.

entries.name: Quiet Office
entries.author: Optimizer Team
entries.description: Lower power for reduced fan noise and heat. Ideal for shared workspaces.

entries.name: Emergency Cleanup
entries.author: Optimizer Team
entries.description: When disk is critically full. Clears temp files, Windows Update cache, and old logs.
